title: Zombie Apocalypse 101
description: A server plugin for 1.21.x that add diffrent zombies and more...
body:
# 🧟 ZombieApocalypse101
ZombieApocalypse101 transforms Minecraft survival into a relentless fight against infection, swarming hordes, and escalating challenges. Designed for servers and content creators, it introduces a full progression system, infection mechanics, and apocalypse events that keep players on edge.

✨ Features
📊 Level System
Gain XP by fighting zombies and surviving events.

/level command shows your current level.

A level boss bar briefly appears whenever you gain XP.

At milestone levels (10, 20, 50, 100, 250, 500, 750, 1000, 10000…), your inventory is wiped to keep the challenge fresh.

🧟 Infection Mechanics
Players can become infected, gaining:

20-40 hearts of health.

A random buff (speed, regeneration, resistance, strength).

A red infection boss bar showing infection status.

While infected:

You cannot harm zombies.

Hostile mobs ignore you.

You burn in sunlight unless you roll a sun‑immune buff.

Curing infection works like zombie villagers:

Apply Weakness.

Eat a Golden Apple.

Your health resets, buffs are cleared, and you’re restored.

🌙 Buffed Zombies at Night
Normal zombies spawn with extra buffs (speed, strength, resistance) during nighttime.

Daytime zombies behave normally (burn in the sun).

🌋 Apocalypse Events
Triggered via /apocalypse start and /apocalypse stop.

During apocalypse:

Massive waves of buffed zombies spawn near players.

All zombies are immune to sunlight.

Red warning messages broadcast to all players.

When the apocalypse ends:

All zombies are cleared.

Survivors receive rare collectibles (reinforced deepslate, etc.).

🎨 Immersive Feedback
Color‑coded chat messages:

Infection warnings in red.

Cure confirmations in green.

Apocalypse alerts in red.

Rewards in gold.

Boss bars for levels and infection status keep players visually engaged.

⚔️ Why Play?
ZombieApocalypse is built to make survival unpredictable and thrilling. Infection forces tough choices, apocalypse events overwhelm even prepared players, and the level system ensures progression never gets too easy. Perfect for YouTube content, server events, or just spicing up your world.

📦 Commands
/level → Shows your current level and progress.

/apocalypse start → Begins an apocalypse event.

/apocalypse stop → Ends the apocalypse and rewards survivors.

🔧 Compatibility
Works with Minecraft 1.21.x (tested on 1.21.10 and 1.21.11).

Built for Paper/Spigot/Bukkit servers.
